title: Mystic Duel
scene_summary: Two rival magicians, Lyra and Kael, engage in a mystical duel to determine dominance.

lines.speaker: Lyra
lines.original_text: You underestimate my power, Kael. The shadows will be your downfall.
lines.tts_text: You underestimate my power, Kael. The shadows will be your downfall.

lines.speaker: Kael
lines.original_text: Ha! You think darkness can defeat fire? I'll incinerate you where you stand!
lines.tts_text: Ha! You think darkness can defeat fire? I'll incinerate you where you stand!

lines.speaker: Lyra
lines.original_text: Foolish pyromancer. Your flames will only serve to fuel the shadows.
lines.tts_text: Foolish pyromancer. Your flames will only serve to fuel the shadows.

lines.speaker: Kael
lines.original_text: You may have mastered illusions, but I've mastered the art of destruction!
lines.tts_text: You may have mastered illusions, but I've mastered the art of destruction!

lines.speaker: Lyra
lines.original_text: We'll see about that. Shadow shield!
lines.tts_text: We'll see about that. Shadow shield!

lines.speaker: Lyra
lines.original_text: Ah, but the shadows are always one step ahead... *fades Kael's flames away*
lines.tts_text: Ah, but the shadows are always one step ahead...

lines.speaker: Lyra
lines.original_text: The art of deception is not just about illusions, but about understanding the opponent. You underestimated me.
lines.tts_text: The art of deception is not just about illusions, but about understanding the opponent. You underestimated me.

lines.speaker: Kael
lines.original_text: I won't make that mistake again...
lines.tts_text: I won't make that mistake again...

lines.speaker: Lyra
lines.original_text: You should have stayed in your flames, Kael. The shadows are where the true power lies.
lines.tts_text: You should have stayed in your flames, Kael. The shadows are where the true power lies.
